name: Creamed Lobster and Clams
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté onion in butter until tender.
2. Blend flour, salt, and cayenne into the mixture.
3. Add half and half all at once.
4. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thick and bubbly.
5. Add white wine, lobster, clams, and mushrooms.
6. Heat through and serve in warm pastry shells.
